acceptedAnswer.text: GEO is the practice of optimizing content to be cited, referenced, and recommended by AI-powered search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google AI Overviews, Claude, and Gemini.

mainEntity.name: How is GEO different from SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: Traditional SEO focuses on ranking in search engine results pages (SERPs). GEO focuses on being the source that AI engines trust and quote in their generated responses.
